description:
PearGuard is a privacy-focused, peer-to-peer parental control app. The parent device pairs directly with the child device — no accounts, no servers, no subscriptions. Your family's activity data lives only on the devices you pair.

PearGuard is designed for families where the child uses an Android device. The parent can use Android or iOS.

FEATURES

Screen Time Limits
Set daily time budgets and bedtime windows on the child device.

Per-App Policies
Allow, block, or time-limit individual apps by category or one at a time.

Activity View
See what's been used and when, directly from the parent device.

Time Requests
The child can request extra time; the parent approves or denies from their device.

Privacy First
No account creation. No email address. No tracking. No ads. Activity never leaves the paired devices.

Open Source
PearGuard is free and open source. Source code is available on GitHub.

PERMISSIONS

Camera — used to scan QR invite codes when pairing with a child device.
Photo Library — used to set profile photos.
